issues.description: Missing conditional logic. Effect has a condition ('If that card's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates"') but DSL contains no conditions array. Must include condition to check revealed card type.
Incomplete action sequence. Card text specifies two actions: draw 2 cards AND trash 1 card from hand. DSL only includes DrawCard; missing TrashFromHand action.
Missing reveal mechanic. Effect requires revealing top deck card first, but no RevealFromHand or search/reveal action is present in DSL.
